tEn: Seedream 4.0: Toward Next-generation Multimodal Image Generation
tZh: Seedream 4.0：迈向下一代多模态图像生成
sEn: Seedream 4.0 unifies text-to-image, editing, and multi-image composition in one framework, achieving state-of-the-art results with fast inference.
sZh: Seedream 4.0 将文本到图像生成、图像编辑和多图像合成统一在一个框架中，实现了快速推理和领先性能。
absEn: We introduce Seedream 4.0, an efficient and high-performance multimodal image generation system that unifies text-to-image (T2I) synthesis, image editing, and multi-image composition within a single framework. We develop a highly efficient diffusion transformer with a powerful VAE which also can reduce the number of image tokens considerably. This allows for efficient training of our model, and enables it to fast generate native high-resolution images (e.g., 1K-4K). Seedream 4.0 is pretrained on billions of text-image pairs spanning diverse taxonomies and knowledge-centric concepts. Comprehensive data collection across hundreds of vertical scenarios, coupled with optimized strategies, ensures stable and large-scale training, with strong generalization. By incorporating a carefully fine-tuned VLM model, we perform multi-modal post-training for training both T2I and image editing tasks jointly. For inference acceleration, we integrate adversarial distillation, distribution matching, and quantization, as well as speculative decoding. It achieves an inference time of up to 1.8 seconds for generating a 2K image (without a LLM/VLM as PE model). Comprehensive evaluations reveal that Seedream 4.0 can achieve state-of-the-art results on both T2I and multimodal image editing. In particular, it demonstrates exceptional multimodal capabilities in complex tasks, including precise image editing and in-context reasoning, and also allows for multi-image reference, and can generate multiple output images. This extends traditional T2I systems into an more interactive and multidimensional creative tool, pushing the boundary of generative AI for both creativity and professional applications. We further scale our model and data as Seedream 4.5. Seedream 4.0 and Seedream 4.5 are accessible on Volcano Engine https://www.volcengine.com/experience/ark?launch=seedream.
absZh: 我们介绍了 Seedream 4.0，一个高效且高性能的多模态图像生成系统，它将文本到图像（T2I）合成、图像编辑和多图像组合统一在单一框架中。我们开发了一个高效的扩散变换器，并配备了一个强大的 VAE，该 VAE 还能显著减少图像 token 的数量。这使得模型训练高效，并能快速生成原生高分辨率图像（例如 1K-4K）。Seedream 4.0 在数十亿涵盖多种分类和知识中心概念的文本-图像对上进行了预训练。通过跨数百个垂直场景的全面数据收集，结合优化策略，确保了稳定的大规模训练和强大的泛化能力。通过整合一个精心微调的 VLM 模型，我们进行了多模态后训练，联合训练 T2I 和图像编辑任务。为了加速推理，我们集成了对抗性蒸馏、分布匹配、量化以及推测解码。生成一张 2K 图像的推理时间可达 1.8 秒（无需 LLM/VLM 作为 PE 模型）。全面评估显示，Seedream 4.0 在 T2I 和多模态图像编辑上均达到了最先进的结果。特别是，它在复杂任务中展现出卓越的多模态能力，包括精确图像编辑和上下文推理，还支持多图像参考，并能生成多个输出图像。这扩展了传统的 T2I 系统，使其成为更具交互性和多维度的创意工具，推动了生成式 AI 在创意和专业应用领域的边界。我们进一步将模型和数据扩展为 Seedream 4.5。Seedream 4.0 和 Seedream 4.5 可在火山引擎上访问：https://www.volcengine.com/experience/ark?launch=seedream。

contrib.en: Unifies T2I, image editing, and multi-image composition in a single framework.
contrib.zh: 在单一框架中统一了文本到图像生成、图像编辑和多图像合成。

contrib.en: Develops an efficient diffusion transformer with a high-compression VAE for fast high-resolution generation.
contrib.zh: 开发了高效扩散Transformer与高压缩VAE，实现快速高分辨率生成。

contrib.en: Achieves over 10x inference acceleration compared to Seedream 3.0 with superior performance.
contrib.zh: 相比Seedream 3.0实现超过10倍推理加速，性能更优。

contrib.en: Performs joint post-training of T2I and image editing using a fine-tuned VLM.
contrib.zh: 使用微调后的视觉语言模型对T2I和图像编辑进行联合后训练。

contrib.en: Integrates adversarial distillation, quantization, and speculative decoding for ultra-fast inference.
contrib.zh: 集成对抗蒸馏、量化和推测解码实现超快推理。

contrib.en: Demonstrates strong multimodal capabilities in complex tasks like in-context reasoning and multi-image reference.
contrib.zh: 在上下文推理和多图像参考等复杂任务中展现强大的多模态能力。

limits.en: Performance drops on hard-level tasks, especially single-image editing.
limits.zh: 在困难级别任务上性能下降，尤其是单图像编辑。

limits.en: Requires large-scale data and compute for pre-training and post-training.
limits.zh: 需要大规模数据和算力进行预训练和后训练。

limits.en: Multimodal understanding and reasoning still need improvement at higher difficulty levels.
limits.zh: 在更高难度级别上，多模态理解和推理仍需改进。

limits.en: Inference acceleration techniques may introduce quality trade-offs in some scenarios.
limits.zh: 推理加速技术在某些场景下可能引入质量权衡。

limits.en: Model scalability is demonstrated but further scaling may face diminishing returns.
limits.zh: 模型可扩展性已得到验证，但进一步扩展可能面临收益递减。

items.en: We introduce Seedream 4.0, an efficient and high-performance multimodal image generation system that unifies text-to-image (T2I) synthesis, image editing, and multi-image composition within a single framework. We develop a highly efficient diffusion transformer with a powerful VAE which also can reduce the number of image tokens considerably. This allows for efficient training of our model, and enables it to fast generate native high-resolution images (e.g., 1K-4K). Seedream 4.0 is pretrained on billions of text–image pairs spanning diverse taxonomies and knowledge-centric concepts. Comprehensive data collection across hundreds of vertical scenarios, coupled with optimized strategies, ensures stable and large-scale training, with strong generalization. By incorporating a carefully fine-tuned VLM model, we perform multi-modal post-training for training both T2I and image editing tasks jointly. For inference acceleration, we integrate adversarial distillation, distribution matching, and quantization, as well as speculative decoding. It achieves an inference time of up to 1.4 seconds for generating a 2K image (without a LLM/VLM as PE model). Comprehensive evaluations reveal that Seedream 4.0 can achieve state-of-the-art results on both T2I and multimodal image editing. In particular, it demonstrates exceptional multimodal capabilities in complex tasks, including precise image editing and in-context reasoning, and also allows for multi-image reference, and can generate multiple output images. This extends traditional T2I systems into an more interactive and multidimensional creative tool, pushing the boundary of generative AI for both creativity and professional applications. Seedream 4.0 is now accessible on Volcano Engineα\alpha.
items.zh: 我们介绍了 Seedream 4.0，一个高效且高性能的多模态图像生成系统，它将文本到图像（T2I）合成、图像编辑和多图像组合统一在单个框架中。我们开发了一个高效的扩散 Transformer 和一个强大的 VAE，后者还能显著减少图像 token 的数量。这使得我们的模型能够高效训练，并快速生成本地高分辨率图像（例如 1K-4K）。Seedream 4.0 在数十亿涵盖多种分类和知识中心概念的文本-图像对上进行了预训练。跨数百个垂直场景的全面数据收集，结合优化策略，确保了稳定的大规模训练和强大的泛化能力。通过引入一个精心微调的 VLM 模型，我们执行多模态后训练，联合训练 T2I 和图像编辑任务。为了加速推理，我们集成了对抗性蒸馏、分布匹配、量化以及推测解码。生成一张 2K 图像的推理时间可达 1.4 秒（无需 LLM/VLM 作为 PE 模型）。全面评估表明，Seedream 4.0 在 T2I 和多模态图像编辑上均能达到最先进的结果。特别是，它在复杂任务中展现出卓越的多模态能力，包括精确图像编辑和上下文推理，还支持多图像参考，并能生成多个输出图像。这扩展了传统的 T2I 系统，使其成为更具交互性和多维度的创意工具，推动了生成式 AI 在创意和专业应用领域的边界。Seedream 4.0 现已在火山引擎上可用。

items.en: [Official Page]https://seed.bytedance.com/seedream4_0 \checkdata[α\alphaModel ID]Doubao-Seedream-4.0
items.zh: [官方页面]https://seed.bytedance.com/seedream4_0 \checkdata[α\alpha模型ID]Doubao-Seedream-4.0

items.capEn: Figure 1: Overall evaluation. Left: Text-to-Image results; Right: Image-Editing results. The Elo scores are obtained from the Artificial Analysis Arena. Seedream 4.0 ranks first in both T2I and image-editing leaderboards, by September 18, 2025.
items.capZh: 图 1：整体评估。左：文本到图像结果；右：图像编辑结果。Elo 分数来自 Artificial Analysis Arena。截至 2025 年 9 月 18 日，Seedream 4.0 在 T2I 和图像编辑排行榜上均排名第一。

items.en: Diffusion models have ushered in a new era in generative AI, enabling the synthesis of images with remarkable fidelity and diversity. Building on recent advances in diffusion transformers (DiTs), state-of-the-art open-source and commercial systems have emerged, such as Stable Diffusion [18], FLUX series [7, 8], Seedream models [4, 3, 21], GPT-4o image generation [15] and Gemini 2.5 flash [5]. However, as the demand for higher image quality, greater controllability, and strong multimodal capabilities (e.g., text-to-image (T2I) synthesis and image editing) increases, current models often have a critical scalability bottleneck.
items.zh: 扩散模型开启了生成式 AI 的新纪元，能够合成具有卓越保真度和多样性的图像。基于扩散 Transformer（DiT）的最新进展，出现了最先进的开源和商业系统，例如 Stable Diffusion [18]、FLUX 系列 [7, 8]、Seedream 模型 [4, 3, 21]、GPT-4o 图像生成 [15] 和 Gemini 2.5 flash [5]。然而，随着对更高图像质量、更强可控性和强大多模态能力（例如文本到图像（T2I）合成和图像编辑）的需求增加，当前模型通常存在关键的扩展性瓶颈。

items.en: In this paper, we introduce Seedream 4.0, a powerful multimodal generative model engineered for scalability and efficiency. We develop an efficient and scalable DiT backbone, which substantially increases the model capacity while reducing the training and inference FLOPs considerably. To further enhance model efficiency, especially for high-resolution image generation, we have developed an efficient Variational Autoencoder (VAE) with a high compression ratio, significantly reducing the number of image tokens in latent space. This architectural design (including our DiT and VAE) makes our model highly efficient, easily scalable, and hardware-friendly in both training and inference. Our training strategy is meticulously designed to unlock the full potential of our architecture, achieving more than 10×\times inference acceleration compared to Seedream 3.0 [3], while having significantly better performance. This allows the model to be trained effectively on billions of text–image pairs at native image resolutions ranging from 1K to 4K, covering a wide range of taxonomy and knowledge-centric concepts.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了 Seedream 4.0，一个专为可扩展性和效率而设计的强大多模态生成模型。我们开发了一个高效且可扩展的 DiT 主干，大幅增加了模型容量，同时显著降低了训练和推理的 FLOPs。为了进一步提高模型效率，特别是对于高分辨率图像生成，我们开发了一个具有高压缩比的高效变分自编码器（VAE），显著减少了潜在空间中的图像 token 数量。这种架构设计（包括我们的 DiT 和 VAE）使我们的模型在训练和推理中都非常高效、易于扩展且硬件友好。我们的训练策略经过精心设计，以充分发挥架构的潜力，与 Seedream 3.0 [3] 相比，实现了超过 10 倍的推理加速，同时性能显著提升。这使得模型能够在数十亿文本-图像对上有效训练，原生图像分辨率从 1K 到 4K，覆盖广泛的分类和知识中心概念。

items.en: In the post-training stage, we incorporate a VLM model with a strong understanding of multimodal inputs into our system， as designed in SeedEdit [21], which enables it with strong multimodal generation ability. We pioneer a joint post-training that integrates both T2I generation and image editing through a causal diffusion designed in the DiT framework. Our post-training stage starts with Continuing Training (CT) to broaden the model’s foundational knowledge and multi-task proficiency. This is followed by Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT), which works to inculcate specific artistic qualities. Subsequently, we implement Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) to meticulously align the model’s outputs with nuanced human preferences. Then a Prompt Engineering (PE) module is developed to unlock the full potential of the model across a diverse spectrum of user inputs. To achieve ultra-fast inference on our DiT, we propose a holistic acceleration system centered on an adversarial learning framework. This core algorithmic advance is synergistically combined with hardware-aware quantization and speculative decoding, culminating in a system that delivers a second-level generation experience without quality degradation.
items.zh: 在后训练阶段，我们将一个对多模态输入有强理解能力的 VLM 模型集成到我们的系统中，如 SeedEdit [21] 中所设计，使其具备强大的多模态生成能力。我们开创了一种联合后训练方法，通过 DiT 框架中设计的因果扩散，将 T2I 生成和图像编辑整合在一起。我们的后训练阶段从持续训练（CT）开始，以拓宽模型的基础知识和多任务能力。随后是监督微调（SFT），旨在灌输特定的艺术品质。接着，我们实施基于人类反馈的强化学习（RLHF），以精细地将模型输出与细微的人类偏好对齐。然后开发了一个提示工程（PE）模块，以释放模型在多样化用户输入中的全部潜力。为了实现 DiT 的超快推理，我们提出了一个以对抗学习框架为核心的整体加速系统。这一核心算法进展与硬件感知量化和推测解码协同结合，最终形成一个能够提供秒级生成体验且质量不下降的系统。

items.en: In summary, Seedream 4.0 presents the following advantages:
items.zh: 总之，Seedream 4.0 具有以下优势：

items.en: Efficient and Scalable Architecture. Our model contains a carefully designed DiT architecture together with a powerful VAE, yet having a high compression ratio. This results in a highly efficient architecture that achieves more than 10×\times training and inference acceleration (measured by compute flops) compared to Seedream 3.0 [3], with significantly better performance obtained. The efficient architecture of Seedream 4.0 allows for strong scalability in terms of modal capacity, task coverage, and multimodel generalization.
items.zh: 高效且可扩展的架构。我们的模型包含精心设计的 DiT 架构和强大的 VAE，同时具有高压缩比。这产生了一个高效架构，与 Seedream 3.0 [3] 相比，实现了超过 10 倍的训练和推理加速（以计算 FLOPs 衡量），同时获得了显著更好的性能。Seedream 4.0 的高效架构在模态容量、任务覆盖和多模态泛化方面具有很强的可扩展性。

items.en: Strong Multi-modal Generation. We extended the Seededit 3.0 [20] architecture for multimodal generation, and perform multimodal joint post-training of T2I and image editing tasks on our pre-trained DiT model. This enables Seedream 4.0 with strong multi-modal capability that allows for single- or multi-image inputs and outputs.
items.zh: 强大的多模态生成。我们扩展了 Seededit 3.0 [20] 架构用于多模态生成，并在预训练的 DiT 模型上对 T2I 和图像编辑任务执行多模态联合后训练。这使得 Seedream 4.0 具备强大的多模态能力，支持单图像或多图像的输入和输出。

items.en: Professional creation scenarios. Beyond artistic imagery, Seedream 4.0 exhibits a strong capability to generate structured, professional and knowledge-based content, such as charts, formulas, and design materials, bridging the gap between creative generation and practical industry applications.
items.zh: 专业创作场景。除了艺术图像，Seedream 4.0 还展现出生成结构化、专业和基于知识的内容的强大能力，例如图表、公式和设计材料，弥合了创意生成与实际行业应用之间的差距。

items.en: Ultra-fast inference speed. With efficient architecture design, we further optimize our framework aggressively to achieve extreme inference acceleration. This allows our model to perform ultrafast image generation and editing at high resolutions (e.g., 2K or 4K), greatly enhancing user interaction experience and production efficiency.
items.zh: 超快推理速度。通过高效的架构设计，我们进一步积极优化框架以实现极致的推理加速。这使得我们的模型能够以高分辨率（例如 2K 或 4K）进行超快图像生成和编辑，极大地增强了用户交互体验和生产效率。

items.en: Seedream 4.0 has been successfully integrated into multiple platforms, including Doubao and Jimeng as of September 2025. It can also be accessible on Volcano Engineα\alpha. We believe Seedream 4.0 will become a practical tool to improve productivity in all aspects of work and daily life. 22footnotetext: https://jimeng.jianying.com/ai-tool/image/generate
items.zh: Seedream 4.0 已成功集成到多个平台，包括截至 2025 年 9 月的豆包和即梦。它也可以在火山引擎上使用。我们相信 Seedream 4.0 将成为提高工作和日常生活各方面生产力的实用工具。

items.en: Data. In Seedream 3.0, we introduced a dual-axis collaborative data sampling framework that jointly optimizes pre-training data along two dimensions: visual morphology and semantic distribution. However, we observed two limitations when applying a purely top-down resampling strategy:
items.zh: 数据。在 Seedream 3.0 中，我们引入了一个双轴协作数据采样框架，该框架沿两个维度联合优化预训练数据：视觉形态和语义分布。然而，我们观察到纯自上而下重采样策略的两个局限性：

items.en: It disproportionately favors natural images in the overall distribution.
items.zh: 它在整体分布中不成比例地偏向自然图像。

items.en: It underrepresents fine-grained, knowledge-centric concepts (e.g., instructional content and mathematical expressions).
items.zh: 它未能充分代表细粒度的知识中心概念（例如教学内容和数学表达式）。

items.en: To address these issues, we redesigned the pipeline specifically for knowledge-related data, including instructional images and formulae.
items.zh: 为了解决这些问题，我们专门为知识相关数据（包括教学图像和公式）重新设计了流程。

items.en: In our pipeline, knowledge data are categorized into natural and synthetic subsets. For natural images, we collect high-quality figures from PDF documents that span in-house textbooks, research articles, and novels. We first deploy a low-quality classifier to filter out undesirable samples (e.g. blurred images, cluttered, or noisy backgrounds). Next, we train a difficulty rating classifier with three levels: easy, medium, and hard, and we annotate all images accordingly. Images with extremely difficulty are down-sampled during pre-training. For synthetic data, we used both OCR output and LaTeX source code (when available) to generate diverse formula images that vary in structure (layout, symbol density) and resolution. This synthesis strategy broadens the coverage of fine-grained concepts and mitigates the biases introduced by top-down resampling.
items.zh: 在我们的流程中，知识数据被分为自然子集和合成子集。对于自然图像，我们从涵盖内部教科书、研究文章和小说的 PDF 文档中收集高质量图形。我们首先部署一个低质量分类器来过滤掉不想要的样本（例如模糊图像、杂乱或嘈杂的背景）。接下来，我们训练一个难度评级分类器，分为三个级别：简单、中等和困难，并对所有图像进行相应标注。难度极高的图像在预训练期间会被降采样。对于合成数据，我们使用 OCR 输出和 LaTeX 源代码（如果可用）来生成多样化的公式图像，这些图像在结构（布局、符号密度）和分辨率上有所不同。这种合成策略拓宽了细粒度概念的覆盖范围，并减轻了自上而下重采样引入的偏差。

items.en: Beyond knowledge-related data, we introduce several module-level upgrades compared to our previous version. (1) we train a text-quality classifier to detect low-quality text in original caption; (2) we combine semantic and low-level visual embeddings in the deduplication pipeline to boost the deduplication results, balancing fine-grained distribution; (3) we refine the captioning model for finer-grained visual descriptions; and (4) we adopt a stronger cross-modal embedding for image–text alignment, substantially improving our multimodal retrieval engine.
items.zh: 除了知识相关数据，我们与之前版本相比引入了几个模块级升级。（1）我们训练了一个文本质量分类器来检测原始标题中的低质量文本；（2）我们在去重流程中结合语义和低级视觉嵌入，以提高去重结果，平衡细粒度分布；（3）我们优化了标题生成模型以获得更细粒度的视觉描述；（4）我们采用了更强的跨模态嵌入用于图像-文本对齐，显著改进了我们的多模态检索引擎。

items.en: Training Strategies. Similar to Seedream 3.0 [3], we adopt multi-stage training to improve training efficiency. In the first stage, we train our DiT at an average resolution of 5122 (with different aspect ratios). In the second stage, we fine-tune our model at higher resolutions spanning from 102421024^{2} to 409624096^{2}. Thanks to the efficient design of our model, training on these higher resolutions up to 4K is still effective.
items.zh: 训练策略。与 Seedream 3.0 [3] 类似，我们采用多阶段训练来提高训练效率。在第一阶段，我们以平均分辨率 512^2（具有不同的宽高比）训练我们的 DiT。在第二阶段，我们在从 1024^2 到 4096^2 的更高分辨率上微调我们的模型。得益于我们模型的高效设计，在这些高达 4K 的高分辨率上训练仍然有效。

items.en: Training Infrastructures. To enable efficient large-scale pre-training of the DiT model, we design a highly optimized training system that emphasizes hardware efficiency, scalability, and robustness. The key components are summarized as follows.
items.zh: 训练基础设施。为了高效大规模预训练DiT模型，我们设计了一个高度优化的训练系统，强调硬件效率、可扩展性和鲁棒性。关键组件总结如下。

items.en: Parallelism and Memory Optimization. We employ Hybrid Sharded Data Parallelism (HSDP) to efficiently shard weights and support large-scale training without resorting to tensor or expert parallelism. Memory usage is optimized through timely release of hidden states, activation offloading, and enhanced FSDP support, enabling training of large models within available GPU resources.
items.zh: 并行与内存优化。我们采用混合分片数据并行（HSDP）来高效分片权重并支持大规模训练，无需使用张量或专家并行。通过及时释放隐藏状态、激活卸载和增强的FSDP支持来优化内存使用，从而在可用GPU资源内训练大型模型。

items.en: Kernel and Workload Optimization. Performance-critical operations are accelerated by combining torch.compile with handcrafted CUDA kernels and operator fusion, reducing redundant memory access. To address workload imbalance from variable sequence lengths, we introduce a global greedy sample allocation strategy with asynchronous pipelines, achieving more balanced per-GPU utilization.
items.zh: 内核与工作负载优化。通过结合torch.compile与手工CUDA内核和算子融合来加速性能关键操作，减少冗余内存访问。为了解决可变序列长度导致的工作负载不平衡，我们引入了一种全局贪心样本分配策略与异步流水线，实现了更均衡的每GPU利用率。

items.en: Fault Tolerance. Multi-level fault tolerance is built into the system, including periodic checkpointing of model, optimizer, and dataloader states, pre-launch health checks to exclude faulty nodes, and reduced initialization overhead. These measures ensure stability and sustained throughput during long-term distributed training.
items.zh: 容错性。系统中内置了多级容错机制，包括模型、优化器和数据加载器状态的定期检查点，启动前健康检查以排除故障节点，以及减少初始化开销。这些措施确保了长期分布式训练期间的稳定性和持续吞吐量。

items.en: We perform an intensive post-training to enhance the multimodal capabilities of our model, including T2I, single image editing, and multi-image reference and output. Specifically, we perform joint training of multiple tasks through multistage post-training, containing continuing training (CT), supervised fine-tuning (SFT), and human feedback alignment (RLHF) [24, 23, 25, 11]; and a carefully fine-tuned prompt engineering (PE) model was also developed. Performance is improved consistently and significantly at each substage, resulting in higher performance compared to models trained on individual tasks. In particular, the CT stage mainly enhances the instruct following ability for image editing, and the SFT further improves the consistency between the reference and edited images considerably.
items.zh: 我们进行了密集的后训练以增强模型的多模态能力，包括文生图（T2I）、单图像编辑以及多图像参考和输出。具体来说，我们通过多阶段后训练进行多任务联合训练，包括持续训练（CT）、监督微调（SFT）和人类反馈对齐（RLHF）[24, 23, 25, 11]；还开发了一个精心微调的提示工程（PE）模型。每个子阶段性能持续显著提升，相比单独任务训练的模型取得了更高性能。特别是，CT阶段主要增强了图像编辑的指令遵循能力，SFT进一步显著提高了参考图像与编辑图像之间的一致性。

items.en: We construct a large amount of editing data that is used in the CT and SFT stages. Each data sample typically has a reference image and a target image, with an editing instruction. Image captions are produced for both reference and target images. We designed three types of caption with different levels of detail, which function as a form of data augmentation during training. In addition, we encourage the use of consistent terminology in captions to describe similarities between reference and target images.
items.zh: 我们构建了大量编辑数据，用于CT和SFT阶段。每个数据样本通常包含参考图像和目标图像，以及编辑指令。为参考图像和目标图像生成图像描述。我们设计了三种不同详细程度的描述，在训练中起到数据增强的作用。此外，我们鼓励在描述中使用一致的术语来描述参考图像和目标图像之间的相似性。

items.en: We trained an end-to-end vision language model (VLM) as our PE model based on Seed1.5-VL [6]. This VLM model processes user input, including a text prompt, a single reference image, or multiple images, and generates the corresponding outputs (for example, the captions of the reference image and the target or predicted image, as did SeedEdit 3.0 [20]), which are then used as input to the DiT model. The functions of the PE model also include task routing, prompt rewriting (with auto-thinking), and optimal aspect ratio estimation. To balance latency and performance, our model dynamically adjusts its thinking budgets based on task complexity, inspired by AdaCoT [12]. This integrated approach enables Seedream 4.0 to better address user intentions, perform complex reasoning, and generate a series of images from a single request.
items.zh: 我们基于Seed1.5-VL [6]训练了一个端到端的视觉语言模型（VLM）作为我们的PE模型。该VLM模型处理用户输入，包括文本提示、单张参考图像或多张图像，并生成相应的输出（例如，参考图像和目标或预测图像的描述，如SeedEdit 3.0 [20]所做），这些输出随后用作DiT模型的输入。PE模型的功能还包括任务路由、提示重写（带自动思考）和最佳宽高比估计。为了平衡延迟和性能，我们的模型根据任务复杂度动态调整其思考预算，受AdaCoT [12]启发。这种集成方法使Seedream 4.0能够更好地理解用户意图，执行复杂推理，并从单个请求生成一系列图像。

items.en: Efficient, High-Quality Synthesis. Our acceleration framework integrates principles from Hyper-SD [17], RayFlow [19], APT [10], and ADM [13] to accelerate Diffusion Transformers (DiTs). Our approach establishes an innovative paradigm where each sample follows an optimized, adaptive trajectory, rather than a shared path to a Gaussian prior. This customization minimizes trajectory overlap and reduces instability. To learn these paths effectively, we employ an adversarial matching framework that replaces fixed divergence metrics, circumventing mode collapse and significantly improving generation stability and sample diversity. This is achieved through a two-stage process, starting with a robust Adversarial Distillation post-training (ADP) stage that uses a hybrid discriminator to ensure a stable initialization. Following this, an Adversarial Distribution Matching (ADM) framework employs a learnable, diffusion-based discriminator for fine-tuning, enabling a more fine-grained matching of complex distributions. Our unified pipeline enables highly efficient few-step sampling, drastically reducing the Number of Function Evaluations (NFE) while achieving results that match or surpass baselines requiring dozens of steps across key dimensions like aesthetic quality, text-image alignment, and structural fidelity, effectively balancing quality, efficiency, and diversity.
items.zh: 高效、高质量合成。我们的加速框架整合了Hyper-SD [17]、RayFlow [19]、APT [10]和ADM [13]的原理，以加速扩散Transformer（DiTs）。我们的方法建立了一个创新范式，其中每个样本遵循优化的自适应轨迹，而不是共享路径到高斯先验。这种定制最小化了轨迹重叠并减少了不稳定性。为了有效学习这些路径，我们采用了一种对抗匹配框架，取代了固定的散度度量，避免了模式崩溃，并显著提高了生成稳定性和样本多样性。这是通过两阶段过程实现的，首先是一个鲁棒的对抗蒸馏后训练（ADP）阶段，使用混合判别器确保稳定的初始化。随后，对抗分布匹配（ADM）框架采用可学习的基于扩散的判别器进行微调，实现了更精细的复杂分布匹配。我们的统一流水线实现了高效的少步采样，大幅减少了函数评估次数（NFE），同时在美学质量、文本-图像对齐和结构保真度等关键维度上达到或超越需要数十步的基线，有效平衡了质量、效率和多样性。

items.en: Quantization. To further boost inference performance without quality loss, we employ a hardware-aware framework combining quantization and sparsity. Our approach uses an adaptive 4/8-bit hybrid quantization, which involves offline smoothing to handle outliers, a search-based optimization to find the best granularity and scaling for sensitive layers, and post-training quantization (PTQ) to finalize parameters. We co-design this with efficient, hardware-specific operators for various bit widths and granularities to maximize performance.
items.zh: 量化。为了在不损失质量的情况下进一步提升推理性能，我们采用了一种结合量化和稀疏性的硬件感知框架。我们的方法使用自适应4/8位混合量化，包括离线平滑以处理异常值、基于搜索的优化以找到敏感层的最佳粒度和缩放，以及后训练量化（PTQ）以最终确定参数。我们与针对不同位宽和粒度的高效硬件特定算子共同设计，以最大化性能。

items.en: Speculative Decoding for PE. Our method builds upon the foundational work of Hyper-Bagel[14] to address the inherent uncertainty in speculative decoding that arises from stochastic token sampling. Our solution conditions feature prediction on both the preceding feature sequence and a token sequence advanced by one timestep. This provides a deterministic target that resolves sampling ambiguity and significantly enhances prediction accuracy. We further improve this process by incorporating a loss function on Key-Value (KV) caches to enable efficient reuse during inference and an auxiliary cross-entropy loss on logits to refine the draft model.
items.zh: PE的推测解码。我们的方法基于Hyper-Bagel [14]的基础工作，解决了推测解码中由于随机令牌采样带来的固有不确定性。我们的解决方案将特征预测同时基于前一个特征序列和提前一个时间步的令牌序列。这提供了一个确定性目标，解决了采样歧义并显著提高了预测准确性。我们通过引入键值（KV）缓存的损失函数以实现推理期间的高效重用，以及logits上的辅助交叉熵损失来改进草稿模型，进一步优化了这一过程。

items.en: In this section, we present a comprehensive evaluation of Seedream 4.0. First, we report the results of an overall ELO score from a public platform, Artificial Analysis Arena [1], as shown in Figure 1. By maintaining a real-time competitive arena, Artificial Analysis Arena continuously incorporates newly released models and provides dynamic leaderboards. The participants cover the Seedream series (Seedream 3.0 [3], Seedream 4.0, and SeedEdit 3.0 [20]) alongside other leading models, including GPT-Image-1 [16], Gemini-2.5 Flash Image [5] (abbreviated as Gemini-2.5), and open-source models such as Qwen-Image [22], and FLUX-Kontext[8]. The results indicate that Seedream 4.0 ranks first in both the single-image editing and text-to-image tracks.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们对Seedream 4.0进行全面评估。首先，我们报告来自公共平台Artificial Analysis Arena [1]的整体ELO得分结果，如图1所示。通过维护实时竞技场，Artificial Analysis Arena持续纳入新发布的模型并提供动态排行榜。参与者涵盖Seedream系列（Seedream 3.0 [3]、Seedream 4.0和SeedEdit 3.0 [20]）以及其他领先模型，包括GPT-Image-1 [16]、Gemini-2.5 Flash Image [5]（缩写为Gemini-2.5）以及开源模型如Qwen-Image [22]和FLUX-Kontext [8]。结果表明，Seedream 4.0在单图像编辑和文生图赛道均排名第一。

items.en: To further explore the fine-grained capabilities of Seedream 4.0, we provide both human evaluation and automated benchmarking results. Across various tasks and dimensions, Seedream 4.0 consistently delivers top-tier performance. Finally, we highlight its excellent multimodal image generation capabilities. By flexibly combining input and output modalities, Seedream 4.0 can support a wide range of creative applications. We also present illustrative examples of these functionalities, while noting that further possibilities remain to be explored through user interaction.
items.zh: 为了进一步探索Seedream 4.0的细粒度能力，我们提供了人工评估和自动基准测试结果。在各种任务和维度上，Seedream 4.0始终提供顶级性能。最后，我们强调了其出色的多模态图像生成能力。通过灵活组合输入和输出模态，Seedream 4.0可以支持广泛的创意应用。我们还展示了这些功能的示例，同时指出通过用户交互仍有更多可能性有待探索。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Results from the Artificial Analysis Arena111Data as of 17:00 (Beijing Time), September 18. https://artificialanalysis.ai/text-to-image/arena?tab=Leaderboard: Seedream 4.0 leads in both the Text-to-Image and Image Editing tracks.
items.capZh: 图3：Artificial Analysis Arena¹的结果（数据截至北京时间9月18日17:00）。https://artificialanalysis.ai/text-to-image/arena?tab=Leaderboard：Seedream 4.0在文生图和图像编辑赛道均领先。

items.en: To benchmark the performance of Seedream 4.0 against other top-tier image generation models, we constructed a comprehensive multimodal benchmark, MagicBench 4.0. The benchmark covers three major task categories: text-to-image (T2I) generation, single-image editing, and multiimage editing. The three tracks consist of 325 prompts, 300 prompts, and 100 prompts, respectively; and each prompt is provided in both Chinese and English. In the following sections, we present a detailed analysis of various models in these tasks.
items.zh: 为了对Seedream 4.0与其他顶级图像生成模型进行基准测试，我们构建了一个全面的多模态基准测试MagicBench 4.0。该基准测试涵盖三大任务类别：文生图（T2I）生成、单图像编辑和多图像编辑。三个赛道分别包含325个提示、300个提示和100个提示；每个提示均提供中英文版本。在以下部分，我们将对这些任务中的各种模型进行详细分析。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Text-to-Image comparisons. Within each group, images are arranged from left to right as Seedream 4.0, GPT-Image-1, and Gemini-2.5. Prompt1: Draw an infographic showing the causes of inflation.; Prompt2: A studio-style portrait of an elderly man: he …, with his left eye tightly closed in a witty and amusing manner.. Prompt3: 狸花猫第一视角自拍，老虎在后面追，超现实主义，写实，黄昏背景; Prompt4: A handsome male model whose left eye pupil is blue wears a torn suit with a pink rose in his left hand; there is only a single dewdrop clearly visible on the edge of the rose petal, as if it were about to fall from the petal to the ground in the next second.
items.capZh: 图4：文生图比较。每组中，图像从左到右依次为Seedream 4.0、GPT-Image-1和Gemini-2.5。提示1：绘制一张信息图，展示通货膨胀的原因。提示2：一位老人的工作室风格肖像：他……，左眼紧闭，表情诙谐有趣。提示3：狸花猫第一视角自拍，老虎在后面追，超现实主义，写实，黄昏背景。提示4：一位英俊的男模特，左眼瞳孔为蓝色，穿着破旧西装，左手持一朵粉色玫瑰；玫瑰花瓣边缘只有一颗清晰可见的露珠，仿佛下一秒就要从花瓣滴落到地面。

items.en: As a fundamental capability of image generation models, T2I generation has always been a key focus of the Seedream series. In addition to conventional dimensions such as prompt alignment, structural stability, and visual aesthetics, we evaluate the model’s performance in two additional aspects: dense text rendering and content understanding. The latter is particularly relevant to prompts that require advanced in-context reasoning or specialized domain knowledge. As shown in Figure 1, Seedream 4.0 demonstrates significant improvements in all evaluation dimensions compared to its predecessor. In particular, it substantially outperforms competing models in visual aesthetics. Figure 4 presents several challenging cases of T2I by comparing Seedream 4.0 with GPT-Image-1 and Gemini-2.5. These samples illustrate the model’s capability in ensuring strong instruction adherence, precise text rendering, and stable visual quality across models, and Seedream 4.0 stands out for its superior visual impact, including a dynamic sense of motion, natural lighting, and coherent color composition.
items.zh: 作为图像生成模型的基本能力，文生图一直是Seedream系列的重点关注方向。除了提示对齐、结构稳定性和视觉美学等常规维度外，我们还评估了模型在另外两个方面的性能：密集文本渲染和内容理解。后者尤其涉及需要高级上下文推理或专业领域知识的提示。如图1所示，Seedream 4.0在所有评估维度上相比前代均有显著提升。特别是在视觉美学方面，它大幅优于竞争模型。图4通过比较Seedream 4.0与GPT-Image-1和Gemini-2.5，展示了几个具有挑战性的文生图案例。这些样本展示了模型在确保强指令遵循、精确文本渲染和稳定视觉质量方面的能力，而Seedream 4.0以其卓越的视觉冲击力脱颖而出，包括动态感、自然光照和连贯的色彩构成。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Single-Image Editing Comparisons. Within each group, images are arranged from left to right as the original image, Seedream 4.0, GPT-Image-1, and Gemini-2.5. Prompt1: 把图中的两只狗改为乐高风格.; Prompt2: Translate the text of the product image into English. Prompt3: Please modify the photo’s perspective to make it look like it was taken directly facing the stairs.; Prompt4: 在图中红框位置添加一只长颈鹿.
items.capZh: 图5：单图像编辑比较。每组中，图像从左到右依次为原始图像、Seedream 4.0、GPT-Image-1和Gemini-2.5。提示1：把图中的两只狗改为乐高风格。提示2：将产品图像中的文字翻译成英文。提示3：请修改照片的视角，使其看起来像是正对着楼梯拍摄。提示4：在图中红框位置添加一只长颈鹿。

items.en: Seedream 4.0 integrates both editing and generation capabilities in a unified pipeline, enabling them to mutually enhance each other and delivering performance that exceeds the previous version, SeedEdit 3.0. A crucial challenge in image editing lies in the trade-off between instruction following and consistency, which is also what our evaluation focuses on. In addition, we also consider structural integrity and text-editing performance. As shown in Figure 1, the results reveal distinct patterns in all leading models. GPT-Image-1 achieves the highest accuracy in instruction following, but ranks lowest in consistency, which is a limitation that has been widely noted. In contrast, Gemini-2.5 excels at preservation, but shows limited capability in instruction following, particularly for tasks such as style transfer and viewpoint transformation, as shown in Figure 5; it also struggles with text editing, especially in Chinese. Seedream 4.0, by comparison, demonstrates more balanced performance in all dimensions. It supports a wide range of editing tasks, maintains strong consistency, and thus achieves a higher level of practical usability.
items.zh: Seedream 4.0在统一流水线中集成了编辑和生成能力，使它们相互增强，并提供了超越前代SeedEdit 3.0的性能。图像编辑中的一个关键挑战在于指令遵循与一致性之间的权衡，这也是我们评估的重点。此外，我们还考虑了结构完整性和文本编辑性能。如图1所示，结果揭示了所有领先模型的不同模式。GPT-Image-1在指令遵循方面准确率最高，但一致性排名最低，这是一个被广泛注意到的局限性。相比之下，Gemini-2.5擅长保留，但在指令遵循方面能力有限，特别是对于风格迁移和视角变换等任务，如图5所示；它在文本编辑方面也存在困难，尤其是中文。相比之下，Seedream 4.0在所有维度上表现出更均衡的性能。它支持广泛的编辑任务，保持强一致性，从而实现了更高的实际可用性。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Multi-image editing comparison. Left: overall evaluation results. Right: two examples, with dashed boxes indicating input references and outputs shown left-to-right as Seedream 4.0, GPT-Image-1, and Gemini-2.5. In the rightmost example, the top-right image is from Seedream 4.0. Prompt1: Referring to the color chart in picture two, transform the room and all the furniture into a dopamine style.; Prompt2: Place the items in image one on the top shelf of the cabinet. Place the items in image two on the middle shelf. Place the items in image three on the bottom shelf of the cabinet.
items.capZh: 图6：多图像编辑比较。左：整体评估结果。右：两个示例，虚线框表示输入参考，输出从左到右为Seedream 4.0、GPT-Image-1和Gemini-2.5。最右侧示例中，右上图像来自Seedream 4.0。提示1：参考图二中的色卡，将房间和所有家具改造成多巴胺风格。提示2：将图像一中的物品放在柜子的顶层架子上。将图像二中的物品放在中层架子上。将图像三中的物品放在柜子的底层架子上。

items.en: Multi-image editing goes beyond the simple combination of multiple images; it requires models to perform rich in-context understanding of objects across different inputs. We compare the performance of Seedream 4.0 against GPT-Image-1 and Gemini-2.5 using an overall metric (GSB) with three objective dimensions: alignment of the instruction, consistency and structure. As illustrated in Figure 6, the results mirror those of single-image editing: GPT-Image-1 shows strength in instruction responsiveness but weak consistency, while Gemini-2.5 excels in preservation, but falls short in responsiveness. In contrast, Seedream 4.0 performs at the highest levels in all dimensions, outperforming the other two models by almost 20% in the GSB metric. A crucial consideration in multi-image editing is structural integrity. We observed that as the number of reference images increases, the outputs of other models tend to suffer from structural degradation. However, Seedream 4.0 maintains more stable and coherent structures, demonstrating robust performance even when provided with more than ten reference images.
items.zh: 多图像编辑超越了简单组合多张图像；它要求模型对不同输入中的对象进行丰富的上下文理解。我们使用整体指标（GSB）比较了Seedream 4.0与GPT-Image-1和Gemini-2.5的性能，该指标包含三个客观维度：指令对齐、一致性和结构。如图6所示，结果与单图像编辑相似：GPT-Image-1在指令响应方面有优势但一致性弱，而Gemini-2.5擅长保留但在响应方面不足。相比之下，Seedream 4.0在所有维度上表现最佳，在GSB指标上几乎领先其他两个模型20%。多图像编辑中的一个关键考虑因素是结构完整性。我们观察到，随着参考图像数量的增加，其他模型的输出往往会出现结构退化。然而，Seedream 4.0保持了更稳定和连贯的结构，即使在提供超过十张参考图像时也表现出鲁棒性能。

items.capEn: Figure 7: Automatic Evaluation with DreamEval. Left: Text-to-Image; Right: Single-Image Editing.
items.capZh: 图7：使用DreamEval进行自动评估。左：文生图；右：单图编辑。

items.en: Automatic evaluation is an essential component of model evaluation as it enables large-scale testing and provides more stable and rapid feedback compared to purely human assessments. We introduce DreamEval, a comprehensive multimodal benchmark comprising four generation scenarios, containing 128 sub-tasks with 1,600 prompts. The scoring process is broken down into fine-grained visual-question-answer for each prompt, making evaluation more interpretable and deterministic. In particular, DreamEval also incorporates tiered difficulty levels that separately assess basic generation skills, advanced generation abilities, and higher-order understanding and reasoning capacity.
items.zh: 自动评估是模型评估的重要组成部分，因为它能够实现大规模测试，并且与纯人工评估相比，提供更稳定、更快速的反馈。我们引入了DreamEval，这是一个全面的多模态基准，包含四个生成场景，涵盖128个子任务和1600个提示。评分过程被分解为每个提示的细粒度视觉问答，使评估更具可解释性和确定性。特别地，DreamEval还包含了分层难度级别，分别评估基础生成技能、高级生成能力以及高阶理解和推理能力。

items.en: The overall results for instruction following are shown in Figure 1, and Figure 6, where the results are well aligned with human evaluations. Detailed performance across three levels of difficulty in the T2I and single-image editing tasks is shown in Figure 6. Several observations can be obtained: (1) Seedream 4.0 and GPT-4o outperform other models in instruction adherence, although Seedream 4.0 exhibits greater variability: it has a slightly lower average score, but its "best-of-4" results are better, suggesting that users can obtain better outputs through sampling. (2) Seedream 4.0 performs well at the Easy and Medium levels, demonstrating strong generative responsiveness; but its performance drops at the Hard level, especially in single-image editing. This highlights the need for improvement in multi-modal understanding and reasoning, which will be improved by scaling our models with related data.
items.zh: 指令遵循的总体结果如图1和图6所示，结果与人工评估高度一致。T2I和单图编辑任务中三个难度级别的详细性能如图6所示。可以得出以下几点观察：（1）Seedream 4.0和GPT-4o在指令遵循方面优于其他模型，尽管Seedream 4.0表现出更大的变异性：其平均分数略低，但“最佳4选1”结果更好，这表明用户可以通过采样获得更好的输出。（2）Seedream 4.0在简单和中等难度级别表现良好，显示出强大的生成响应能力；但在困难级别性能下降，尤其是在单图编辑中。这凸显了在多模态理解和推理方面需要改进，我们将通过使用相关数据扩展模型规模来改进这一点。

items.en: We present several illustrative use cases of Seedream 4.0 in this section. These examples highlight only part of its potential, as further creative applications will emerge through user exploration.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们展示了Seedream 4.0的几个说明性用例。这些示例仅突出了其部分潜力，因为进一步的创造性应用将通过用户探索而涌现。

items.en: Image editing has long been a critical challenge for generative models, with the main difficulty lying in achieving the desired modifications while preserving the majority of the original visual characteristics. Seedream 4.0 enables high-quality image editing solely from prompt-based input. It demonstrates strong instruction-following capability, delivering precise modifications while largely preserving the integrity of the surrounding visual content. As illustrated in Figure 8, beyond canonical tasks such as addition, deletion, modification, and replacement, Seedream 4.0 shows remarkable performance in a variety of practical editing scenarios. For instance, in background replacement, it seamlessly integrates the foreground with other elements, and in portrait retouching, it delivers results that exhibit photographic realism.
items.zh: 图像编辑长期以来一直是生成模型的关键挑战，主要难点在于在保留大部分原始视觉特征的同时实现所需的修改。Seedream 4.0仅通过基于提示的输入即可实现高质量的图像编辑。它展示了强大的指令遵循能力，能够在很大程度上保留周围视觉内容完整性的同时进行精确修改。如图8所示，除了添加、删除、修改和替换等典型任务外，Seedream 4.0在各种实际编辑场景中表现出色。例如，在背景替换中，它能够将前景与其他元素无缝融合；在人像修饰中，它能够产生具有摄影真实感的结果。

items.en: Unlike image editing, reference-based generation presents a more challenging trade-off between preservation and creativity. This difficulty arises from the inherently ambiguous definition of what should be preserved. It may be a person’s ID or IP, a particular artistic style, or even an abstract concept. Consequently, the range of possible applications is broader and more diverse. As illustrated in Figure 9, Seedream 4.0 supports seamless transformations across 2D/3D domains with varying viewpoints. It enables derivative designs such as dolls, clothes, or memes from a single reference image. In addition, benefiting from the strong consistency by Seedream 4.0, it can be effectively applied to identity-sensitive scenarios, including generating portrait photographs in different styles or creating characters for film.
items.zh: 与图像编辑不同，基于参考的生成在保留和创造性之间提出了更具挑战性的权衡。这种困难源于需要保留的内容本身定义模糊。它可能是一个人的身份或IP、特定的艺术风格，甚至是抽象概念。因此，可能的应用范围更广、更多样。如图9所示，Seedream 4.0支持跨2D/3D域的无缝变换，并具有不同的视角。它能够从单个参考图像生成衍生设计，如玩偶、服装或表情包。此外，得益于Seedream 4.0的强大一致性，它可以有效应用于身份敏感的场景，包括生成不同风格的肖像照片或为电影创建角色。

items.capEn: Figure 10: Examples of visual signal controllable generation.
items.capZh: 图10：视觉信号可控生成示例。

items.en: Visual signals, such as Canny edges, sketches, inpainting masks, or depth maps, have long been a crucial component of controllable generation. They enable a transfer of information that is often difficult to describe through language, such as human poses or precise spatial layouts, thereby allowing for more accurate and targeted generation. Traditionally, this capability has been developed using multiple specialized models such as ControlNet [26, 9]. In contrast, Seedream 4.0 natively integrates these functionalities with a single model. Beyond supporting the common forms of visual guidance, it also accommodates creative inputs through simple strokes or sketches, and even enables new multi-image compositions driven by visual signals. Illustrative examples are provided in Figure 10.
items.zh: 视觉信号，如Canny边缘、草图、修复掩码或深度图，长期以来一直是可控生成的重要组成部分。它们能够传递通常难以通过语言描述的信息，例如人体姿态或精确的空间布局，从而实现更准确、更有针对性的生成。传统上，这种能力是使用多个专用模型（如ControlNet [26, 9]）开发的。相比之下，Seedream 4.0通过单一模型原生集成了这些功能。除了支持常见的视觉引导形式外，它还通过简单的笔画或草图接受创意输入，甚至实现了由视觉信号驱动的新型多图像组合。说明性示例见图10。

items.en: With the increasing intelligence of multimodal models, a new paradigm for in-context reasoning generation has emerged. Traditional image generation aims primarily at producing outputs that strictly follow the instructions given. In contrast, reasoning-based generation requires the model to go a step further: it must extract implicit contextual cues and infer plausible outcomes before genearating the image. This process may involve expanding the original prompt and interpreting reference images. As illustrated in Figure 11, Seedream 4.0 demonstrates reasoning capabilities across various in-context understanding tasks, including interpreting physical and temporal constraints of the real world, as well as imagining three-dimensional space. Additionally , Seedream 4.0 can also perform tasks such as puzzle solving, crossword filling, and comic continuation, all while faithfully preserving the visual style and fine-grained details of the given input.
items.zh: 随着多模态模型智能程度的提高，一种新的上下文推理生成范式已经出现。传统图像生成的主要目标是产生严格遵循给定指令的输出。相比之下，基于推理的生成要求模型更进一步：它必须在生成图像之前提取隐含的上下文线索并推断出合理的结果。这个过程可能涉及扩展原始提示和解释参考图像。如图11所示，Seedream 4.0在各种上下文理解任务中展示了推理能力，包括解释现实世界的物理和时间约束，以及想象三维空间。此外，Seedream 4.0还可以执行诸如拼图求解、填字游戏和漫画续写等任务，同时忠实地保留给定输入的视觉风格和细粒度细节。

items.en: Benefiting from the richer information provided by multiple images, multi-image reference enables more imaginative and versatile applications. Beyond conventional tasks such as virtual try-on or image collage, it supports flexible composition of multiple characters or objects, as well as abstract style transfer. Unlike text conditioning, which requires explicitly specifying attributes or styles, multi-image editing compels the model to autonomously extract salient features from reference images and transfer them to the target. As illustrated in Figure 12, Seedream 4.0 can handle reference-based editing with more than ten input images, while maintaining high fidelity in transferring abstract styles such as origami or Baroque aesthetics. Moreover, it effectively manages relative object scales and produces meaningful multi-object compositions, such as assembling mechanical parts, demonstrating a robust understanding of physical-world structures.
items.zh: 得益于多张图像提供的更丰富信息，多图像参考能够实现更具想象力和多样化的应用。除了虚拟试穿或图像拼贴等传统任务外，它还支持多个角色或对象的灵活组合，以及抽象风格迁移。与需要明确指定属性或风格的文本条件不同，多图像编辑迫使模型自主地从参考图像中提取显著特征并将其迁移到目标上。如图12所示，Seedream 4.0可以处理超过十张输入图像的基于参考的编辑，同时在迁移抽象风格（如折纸或巴洛克美学）时保持高保真度。此外，它有效管理相对物体尺度，并产生有意义的多对象组合，例如组装机械零件，展示了对物理世界结构的稳健理解。

items.en: Single-image generation is insufficient for many creative scenarios that require coherent multi-image outputs. Leveraging strong capabilities in global planning and in-context consistency, Seedream 4.0 supports the generation of image sequences that remain both character-consistent and stylistically aligned. As illustrated in Figure 13, this enables sequential images generation based on given characters, which is particularly beneficial for storyboarding and comic creation. Seedream 4.0 can also produce sets of images with a consistent visual identity, a feature highly valuable for IP-based product design and the creation of emoji.
items.zh: 对于许多需要连贯多图像输出的创意场景，单图像生成是不够的。凭借强大的全局规划和上下文一致性能力，Seedream 4.0支持生成保持角色一致和风格一致的图像序列。如图13所示，这实现了基于给定角色的序列图像生成，对于故事板和漫画创作特别有用。Seedream 4.0还可以生成具有一致视觉身份的图像集，这一特性对于基于IP的产品设计和表情包创作非常有价值。

items.capEn: Figure 13: Examples of multi-image output generation.
items.capZh: 图13：多图像输出生成示例。

items.capEn: Figure 14: Examples of advanced text rendering.

items.en: Seedream 4.0 introduces enhanced text-rendering capabilities that go beyond mere demonstration to serve practical applications. With intelligent understanding and extension as well as high-precision dense text rendering capabilities, it supports various complex text and graphic generation tasks, including designing layouts for user interfaces, posters, or schematics, as well as generating knowledge-intensive visualizations such as mathematical formulas, chemical equations, or statistical charts, as shown in Figure 14. Such capabilities make it feasible for the model to directly produce educational materials, technical manuals, or marketing content. In addition, Seedream 4.0 enables precise text-aware editing, including content replacement, layout adjustment, and font modification, thereby extending its rendering capacity to practical workflows and offering support for work-related scenarios.
items.zh: Seedream 4.0引入了增强的文本渲染能力，超越了简单的演示，服务于实际应用。凭借智能理解和扩展以及高精度密集文本渲染能力，它支持各种复杂的文本和图形生成任务，包括设计用户界面、海报或示意图的布局，以及生成知识密集型可视化内容，如数学公式、化学方程式或统计图表，如图14所示。这些能力使得模型能够直接生成教育材料、技术手册或营销内容。此外，Seedream 4.0实现了精确的文本感知编辑，包括内容替换、布局调整和字体修改，从而将其渲染能力扩展到实际工作流程，为工作相关场景提供支持。

items.en: Traditional generation models typically require a specified resolution, and selecting an unsuitable aspect ratio can lead to suboptimal composition and layout. Seedream 4.0 introduces an adaptive aspect ratio mechanism (while still supporting user-specified size), enabling the model to automatically adjust the canvas according to either the semantic requirements or the reference objects’ shapes. As illustrated in Figure 15, it allows the generation of images with more aesthetically pleasing and contextually appropriate compositions. Moreover, Seedream 4.0 further extends its supporting resolution up to 4K. This advancement goes beyond research prototypes, delivering image quality suitable for commercial applications.
items.zh: 传统的生成模型通常需要指定分辨率，选择不合适的宽高比可能导致构图和布局不佳。Seedream 4.0引入了自适应宽高比机制（同时仍支持用户指定尺寸），使模型能够根据语义要求或参考对象的形状自动调整画布。如图15所示，它能够生成具有更美观和上下文合适构图的图像。此外，Seedream 4.0进一步将其支持的分辨率扩展到4K。这一进步超越了研究原型，提供了适合商业应用的图像质量。

items.capEn: Figure 15: Examples of adaptive ratio and 4K generation.
items.capZh: 图15：自适应比例和4K生成示例。

items.en: In this report, we present Seedream 4.0, an advanced multimodal image generation framework that integrates an efficient and scalable diffusion transformer with a high-compression VAE, achieving more than ten times the acceleration of the previous Seedream 3.0 model, while delivering superior performance on all aspects. By performing joint post-training on T2I and image editing tasks, Seedream 4.0 provides strong multimodal generation capabilities that support diverse inputs and outputs. It demonstrates broad potential for creative exploration, including precise image editing, reference-based generation, multi-image composition, and multi-image output. In particular, the designed model architecture is highly efficient and stable, which allows us to scale it effectively, with considerable performance improvement achieved (in our on-going work). Furthermore, with advanced inference acceleration technologies, Seedream 4.0 enables ultrafast image generation and editing at high resolutions. In addition, it also has the strong ability to support complicated content generation for professional scenarios, such as knowledge-centric generation, which is difficult to perform by previous models. With its integration into platforms such as Doubao and Jimeng/Dreamina [2], Seedream 4.0 shows great potential to become a powerful productivity tool in content creation, for professional and everyday applications.
items.zh: 在本报告中，我们介绍Seedream 4.0，这是一个先进的多模态图像生成框架，集成了高效可扩展的扩散Transformer和高压缩VAE，相比之前的Seedream 3.0模型实现了十倍以上的加速，同时在所有方面都表现出更优的性能。通过对T2I和图像编辑任务进行联合后训练，Seedream 4.0提供了强大的多模态生成能力，支持多样化的输入和输出。它在创意探索方面展现出广泛潜力，包括精确图像编辑、基于参考的生成、多图像合成以及多图像输出。特别地，所设计的模型架构高效且稳定，使我们能够有效进行规模扩张，并取得了显著的性能提升（在我们的持续工作中）。此外，借助先进的推理加速技术，Seedream 4.0能够以高分辨率实现超快速图像生成和编辑。同时，它还具有强大的能力，支持专业场景下的复杂内容生成，例如以知识为中心的生成，这是以往模型难以实现的。通过集成到豆包、即梦/Dreamina [2]等平台，Seedream 4.0在内容创作中展现出成为强大生产力工具的巨大潜力，适用于专业和日常应用。
